name: Cookies and Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Creme-filled Cookies (e.g., chocolate sandwich cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cream cheese filling by combining cream cheese and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add whipped cream to the cream cheese mixture and stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, rehydrate gelatin with cold water and mix into the milk until blended.
4. Mix the softened margarine into the wet cookie crumbs (either finely or coarsely chopped).
5. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, mixing gently until well incorporated.
6. Pour batter into a greased springform pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 1 hour, or until set.
8. Let cool completely before serving.
